title: Tools for a smoke-free life (Video 2) - Canada.ca
content:
## Tools for a smoke-free life (Video 2)
With described video
(Someone's hands are fidgeting.)
Uplifting music starts
Text on screen: You know why you want to quit smoking
On screen text: What about how?
Text on screen: I quit with pharmacist advice & medication
Text on screen: I quit with a support group & cystisine
Text on screen: Combine the right tools and support to improve your chances of success!
Text on screen: Canada.ca/quit-smoking
Government of Canada Identifier
